content.en:
Xuan Ze Jizun didn't dare to complain, for him, it was good to be able to come out alive.

Compared to those ancient level Ultimate Realm Lords who had fallen, he was lucky.

It's just that he will never go to such a dangerous Ultimate Supreme Inheritance Land in the future, otherwise he doesn't dare to guarantee that he will be alive next time.

And the Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord and the Ancient Level Ultimate Realm Lord in the outside world were also a little surprised when they learned some of the circumstances of the Doomsday Extreme Venerable Inheritance Land.

These Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords had not actually entered the Land of Doomsday Extreme Venerable's Inheritance, and only a few Ancient Rank Ultimate Realm Masters had only understood a little bit of the situation inside.

But now that he learned the specific situation from Xuan Ze Jizun's mouth, he was also very surprised.

I have to say that the land of the inheritance of the Doomsday Supreme is simply the land of death.

Of course, this was a good thing for these Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords, who were happy to see such a "four-six-zero" situation happen.

......

Doomsday Exaltation here.

Shadow Sand Jizun smiled and said, "Doomsday Jizun, your inheritance land is a bit excessive, everyone has come out of the third round of assessment, but you erased the other party's memory of that inheritance. "

"I don't even dare to break through the fourth round of assessment, what qualifications do such waste materials have to cultivate my final secret method? In fact, the fourth round is not dangerous, even if you fail, you can take the final secret method alive. It's a pity that they are scared, and they deserve nothing to be gained. Doomsday Supreme sneered.

"Doomsday Venerable, has your Doomsday Secret Method been perfected?"

Shadow Sand Extreme Venerable asked curiously.

"Not yet!" "Not yet!" Doom Extreme Zun shook his head, "I exhausted the Infinite Ultimate Era, and in the end, I only created a half-finished product from the research of the Ultimate Secret Method, but even if it is a half-finished product, it can make an Ultimate Realm Lord give birth to the ultimate will, provided that the other party does not fall." According to my original deduction, the truly completed Ultimate Secret Method is able to make the ultimate will of the Ultimate Extremity reach the true limit, but unfortunately it still can't be done. "

"Doomsday Extreme Venerable, the Ultimate Secret Method you created is already very rebellious, but unfortunately the price is too great, and it is too easy to fall, otherwise, you can cultivate a group of top Eternal Ultimate Realm Lords, and maybe you can give birth to a few more Ultimate Extreme Masters. Shadow Sand Extreme Venerable said.

"Regardless of this little thing, let's continue to drink tea!"

"Good!"

Doomsday Extreme Venerable and Shadow Sand Supreme Venerable continued to drink tea and talk about the Tao, and no longer cared about the small things in the inheritance land of the Ultimate Land.

......

Soon, the third round of the Doomsday Supreme Venerable's assessment had ended, and all those Ultimate Realm Masters who had not practiced the Ultimate Secret Method had been wiped out.

Except for the Ancient Rank Ultimate Realm Lords who went out, there were only seven people left who decided to enter the fourth round.

Airplanes!

The seven of them entered the fourth round, and in the fourth round, they also saw three high-level Ultimate Realm Masters, and it was estimated that only a few of the other Giant-level Ultimate Realm Masters had gone out, and the others should have fallen.

Previously, the ancient-level Ultimate Realm Lord and the Hao-level Ultimate Realm Lord should have been assessed with different difficulties, but now that it is the last round of assessment, both sides have converged here.

Obviously, this last round of assessment has nothing to do with cultivation, nor does it have anything to do with the realm of the ultimate rules, otherwise it would be too unfair to the Hao-level Ultimate Realm Lord.

Wow!

A picture emerges.

The fourth round of assessment is to enter this picture, and then come out, as long as you successfully come out, you can pass the last round of assessment.

If you can't get out, you'll be sent out.

This level doesn't fall!

"The fourth level doesn't even fall. "

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

He thought that according to the character of the Doomsday Extreme Venerable, the fourth round would still make several ancient-level Ultimate Realm Masters fall, but he didn't expect the other party to be merciful.

Whew!!!

Seven ancient-level Ultimate Realm Lords and three Hao-level Ultimate Realm Masters have entered this picture scroll.

After Ye Tian came in, he found that his ultimate rules, physical strength, and cultivation had all disappeared, and it could be said that they had all been suppressed and could not be used.

The heaven and earth in this scroll can't see any way except for countless runes, and they don't know how to get out at all.

And these runes are simple and don't seem to contain any mystery.

And now he is restricted from cultivation and the ultimate rules, just like an ordinary person, if he wants to comprehend this rune, he can't realize anything.

"Strange, what's the purpose of this fourth level?"

Ye Tian was very puzzled.

And several other Ultimate Realm Masters were also extremely puzzled, and they walked around in the picture scroll one after another, but when they reached the end, they couldn't get out of the picture scroll.

And just like that, time passed slowly.

Ye Tian originally wanted to use other copy bodies to comprehend the rune patterns, but he found that he had completely disconnected from the copy body in the picture scroll, so he couldn't help the copy body in the picture scroll.......

Ye Tian said darkly.

He could only rely on his replica body to get out of this picture scroll now.

In the years that followed, he continued to research, but he never gained anything.

However, he had memorized the countless runes.

Then, he sat cross-legged, assembling countless runes in his mind, trying to comprehend them in the simplest way possible.

"Hey, these runes seem to be able to be put together, can't it be that simple?"

Ye Tian tried to stitch it together, and found that the Doomsday Supreme Venerable might have used such a simple method to set up the assessment.

After a period of time, these countless runes were finally stitched together into two words.

【Doomsday】

Then, the word doom turned into a picture.

This picture is a move by the Doomsday Extremity, a very simple blow that does not seem to contain any power, but it seems to contain countless ultimate ways.

The point is that Ye Tian only felt that this move was a very simple move, without any superfluous thoughts, but it could explode into a terrifying blow.

"Simplicity!"

Ye Tian realized in his heart that maybe any ultimate path came to an end, and it was not too complicated, and the more complicated the comprehension, the more likely it was to fall into it, and thus not be able to get out.

The same is true of this picture scroll, if you think too complicated, you will be trapped here and never be able to get out.

"I see!"

5.3 Ye Tian forgot everything, forgot his own path, forgot the picture scroll, and the trick of the Doomsday Supreme Zun echoed in his mind, and then began to keep trying to show it.

Once, failure!

Ten times, failure!

Billions of times, failure!

Ye Tian didn't care about the number of times anymore, he kept trying.

I don't know how long it has been.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian slashed out the picture scroll with a knife and walked out of it.

Far away.

Doomsday Extreme Venerable was slightly surprised, "Hey, there really is really an ancient-level Ultimate Realm Lord who has walked out of my Doomsday Scroll!"

Shadow Sand Extreme Venerable was also slightly surprised: "This little guy is very good, he has initially sensed a trace of the mystery of the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, his move already has the power of the Ultimate Arcane, and has the potential to become the Ultimate Extreme Venerable." "。
